flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 32% at Neumann University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.6k vs 2.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Neumann University rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.6k → $21.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Neumann University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.5k → $39.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Neumann University fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (51.2% → 45.1%).
